title: Pure Optimization
description: Optimization mods only, for Fabric servers. Maximum performance you can get for a Fabric vanilla Minecraft server.
body: # About - This is a server modpack for people who only want ****pure performance**** boost for vanilla Minecraft server. - ****No effect**** on gameplay. - This modpack will massively increase your vanilla server side loading speed & provide better game calculation, say goodbye to lag This modpack adds several best optimization mods on modrinth (see Mods list below) - If you are looking to setup a fast & optimized vanilla Minecraft server quickly without looking for the optimized mods over & over again, - If you want a starter template for your own modpacks, Then this modpack is your best choice! It contains some of the most famous optimization mods. # Mods [](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancements-debug) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/async-locator) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/convenient-mobgriefing) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/recipecooldown) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/restart-server) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherportalfix) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) \ ## How to use If you already have a Fabric server jar file, run the server once, then download the pack and unzip the mods and put them into the mods folder, and it's done! ## Attention - All the mods contained in the modpack are not created/owned by me - If you added your own mods and find conflicts between your mods and mods from the modpack, please resolve it yourself! - If you find any crashes, unexpected errors, please double check the crash report, if you believe the issue is not caused by your system drivers issue or hardware problem, please report to my discord server (issues channel)! ## Other ### Reason to make this pack For quick server setup when playing vanilla Minecraft with friends, also a template for future modpack release. ### Future updates after finishing Visual+, another vanilla tweak modpack, I'll get my hands on all other PO packs
